acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md has a '## 0.3.0 - 2026-07-11' section (the former Unreleased content) and no remaining Unreleased heading with content.
dist/rigor.cjs is byte-identical to a fresh npm run build.
rigor release-check version-sync, changelog-entry, and bundle-built findings would pass for 0.3.0.
Full suite (test:all, bench, plugin validate --strict, git diff --check) passes.
constraints: Only the version bump, changelog dating, and bundle rebuild; no source, schema, test, policy, or workflow change.
Do not alter changelog content other than renaming the Unreleased heading to the dated 0.3.0 heading.
